productDisplayName: French Connection Men Green & White Check Cargo Shorts
description: Style NoteThe classic checked shorts gets a season update from french connection. This stylish piece is a super comfy pair that's versatile enough to be dressed up or pared down to the basics. Wear this with a monochrome tee to balance your look.Product DetailsGreen, grey and white checked shorts, has a button closure at the waistband centre and a three button fly, drawstring and loops at the waistband, two buttoned flap pockets at the front above the knee and two at the back at the seat regionMaterial and care100% cottonWash as cottonWash and dry inside outSize and FitRegular FitThe model (height 6' and waist 32") is wearing a size 32
